---
title: "Blogs"
description: "Two distinct blogs — SaddlePoint for academic and technical writing, Asankhya for personal essays."
---

Two distinct streams of writing live here:

### [SaddlePoint](../saddlepoint/)

Academic and technical blog — statistics, machine learning, statistical
signal processing, and adjacent topics. Long-form notes, derivations,
and write-ups of ideas worth keeping around.

### [Asankhya](../asankhya/)

Personal blog — essays, notes from books, observations, slower thinking.
Quieter, less structured, more reflective.

---

Each blog has its own RSS feed:
[SaddlePoint feed](../saddlepoint/index.xml) ·
[Asankhya feed](../asankhya/index.xml).
